title: trifolium cyrenaicum
intro: Trifolium cyrenaicum, also known as Cyrenaican clover, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is a perennial legume native to the Mediterranean region, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Trifolium cyrenaicum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Trifolium cyrenaicum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing.
